title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at KPMG India
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
